---
title: "Presentations & Talks"
description:
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

### Invited Talks & Seminars

- From Brain Waves to Heartbeats: How Sleep Shapes Memory and Cognitive Health. Psychology Departmental Seminar, University of Essex, UK (2026, Jan)

- How do hippocampal ripples orchestrate cortical dynamics during human sleep? Experimental Psychology Department Seminar Series, University of Oxford, UK (2025, Nov)

- From brain waves to memories: Harnessing brain imaging and AI to read the inner workings of human memory. Mind, Brain and Behaviour (MBB) Cluster Seminar, Wolfson College, Oxford, UK (2024, Nov)

- SLUMBER — Spatiotemporal Localization Using MEG-EEG for Brain-wide Events during NREM. Oxford Sleep Initiative Meeting, Oxford, UK (2024, Nov)

- The central-autonomic seesaw of sleep-dependent episodic memory and working memory improvements. Seminar Series, Project TYRA (Taiwanese Young Researcher Association) (2023, April)

- The central-autonomic seesaw of sleep-dependent episodic memory and working memory improvements. Institute of Neuroscience Seminar, National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University, Taipei, Taiwan (2022, Oct)

- Autonomic-Central Interactions During Sleep Strongly Impacts Sleep-Dependent Cognitive Plasticity. Eisai Inc. (Virtual; 2021, May)

- Trusting your heart during sleep in the fight against cognitive aging. UCI Grad Slam Semi-Final Competition (Virtual; 2021, Jan)

- Spindles switch the sleeping brain from frontal lobe to hippocampal processing: A pharmacology study. UCI CogSci Colloquium Flash Talks Series (Virtual; 2020, Oct)

- Why do we sleep? The impacts of sleep on emotion and memory. Academic Salon, Taiwanese Graduate Student Association, UCI (2017, Dec)


### Conference Talks

- Cortical signatures of hippocampal ripples in human sleep: From single-units, LFPs, to scalp EEG. Nanosymposium speaker, Society for Neuroscience, San Diego, CA, USA (2025, Nov)

- Cortical signatures of hippocampal ripples in human sleep — can we decode hippocampal ripples from scalp EEG? Data Blitz, 4th International Conference on Memory Replay, Cardiff, UK (2025, May)

- Neural correlates of working memory improvement during sleep. Data Blitz, Winter Memory Conference, Park City, UT, USA (2025, Jan)

- Simultaneous EEG-MEG sleep recording and source localization reveal precise spatial temporal distribution of spindle activity during sleep. MEG-UKI Conference, Birmingham, UK (2024, Oct) *(also presented as a poster)*

- Hippocampal ripples during offline periods predict motor sequence learning. Data Blitz, Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Neuroscience Society, Toronto, Canada (2024, April) *(also presented as a poster)*

- Integrating measurements of the autonomic nervous system and heart-brain interactions with sleep and memory research. 3rd International Sleep Replay Workshop, Huntington Beach, CA, USA (2023, April)

- Working and episodic memory vie for resources during sleep. Open-paper speaker, Learning & Memory 2023, Huntington Beach, CA, USA (2023, April)

- The role of the autonomic nervous system in the science of sleep. Symposium speaker, 35th Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Sleep Medicine/APSS (Virtual; 2021, June)

- The sleeping brain switches from frontal-subcortical working memory to hippocampal episodic memory processing during NREM sleep. 35th Annual Meeting of APSS (Virtual; 2021, June)

- Competitive dynamics underlie cognitive improvements during sleep. 2021 Virtual Working Memory Symposium (Virtual; 2021, June)

- The sleeping brain switches between working memory and long-term memory processing. Data blitz, Spring Conference at UCI Center for the Neurobiology of Learning and Memory, Irvine, CA (2021, May)

- The sleeping brain switches from frontal-subcortical working memory to hippocampal episodic memory processing during NREM sleep. UCI Associated Graduate Student Virtual Symposium (Virtual; 2021, April)

- Vagolytic effect of Zolpidem on sleep-dependent memory: A trade-off between working memory and long-term memory. 2020 Neuromatch Conference 3.0 (Virtual; 2020, Oct)

- Unsupervised learning of sleep stages from polysomnography (PSG) data. 2nd Annual Computational Data Neuroscience Symposium (Virtual; 2020, Oct)

- Age-related losses in cardiac autonomic activity during a daytime nap. 2nd Annual Computational Data Neuroscience Symposium (Virtual; 2020, Oct)

- Coupling of autonomic and central events during sleep boosts working memory in healthy young adults. 2020 Virtual Working Memory Symposium (Virtual; 2020, June)

- The roles of autonomic activities during sleep on cognition. Spring Conference at UCI Center for the Neurobiology of Learning and Memory (2019, May)


### Posters at Scientific Conferences

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Stritzelberger, J., Hamer, H., & Staresina, B. (2025, Nov). Signatures of hippocampal ripples during human sleep: From spiking activity, LFP to scalp EEG. Human Single-Neuron Meeting 2025, Los Angeles, CA, USA.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Stritzelberger, J., Hamer, H., & Staresina, B. (2025, April). Cortical signatures of hippocampal ripples in human sleep. Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Neuroscience Society, Boston, MA, USA.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Zhang, J., Tambini, A., & Mednick, S. C. (2022, June). How do slow oscillation and vagal activity support working memory? An EEG/fMRI study. 35th Annual Meeting of APSS, Charlotte, NC, USA.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Niknazar, H., Alaynick, W. A., Whitehurst, L. N., & Mednick, S. C. (2021, Aug). Competitive dynamics underlie cognitive improvements during sleep. 41st Annual Conference of the North America Taiwanese Professors' Association (Virtual).

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Niknazar, H., Alaynick, W. A., Whitehurst, L. N., & Mednick, S. C. (2021, April). The sleeping brain switches between working memory and long-term memory processing. Women in STEM Symposium 2021 (Virtual).

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Whitehurst, L. N., Naji, M., & Mednick, S. C. (2020, Aug). Age-related changes in central autonomic couplings during sleep. 34th Annual Meeting of APSS (Virtual).

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Whitehurst, L. N., Naji, M., & Mednick, S. C. (2019, Sep). Coupling of autonomic and central events during sleep boosts working memory in healthy young adults. Annual Meeting of the World Sleep Congress, Vancouver, BC, Canada.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Sattari, N., Whitehurst, L. N., & Mednick, S. C. (2019, June). Parasympathetic activity during sleep, but not wake, facilitates working memory improvement: A comparison of young and older adults. Annual Meeting of the World Sleep Congress, Vancouver, BC, Canada.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Whitehurst, L. N., Naji, M., & Mednick, S. C. (2019, June). Coupling of autonomic and central events during sleep boosts working memory in healthy young adults. Annual Meeting of APSS, San Antonio, TX, USA.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Whitehurst, L. N., Naji, M., & Mednick, S. C. (2018, April). A daytime nap facilitates working memory in healthy young adults. Learning & Memory 2018, Huntington Beach, CA, USA.

- **Chen, P.-C.**, Jan, Y.-W., & Yang, C.-M. (2016, June). Discrepancy between subjective and objective actigraphic sleep estimation for individuals with low and high sleep vulnerability. Annual Meeting of APSS, Denver, CO, USA.


### Mentee-Led Posters

- Shuster, A., **Chen, P.-C.**, Niknazar, H., McDevitt, E., Lopour, B., & Mednick, S. C. (2024, Dec). REM alpha bursts predict hippocampal-dependent forgetting. 4th International Sleep Replay Workshop (Virtual).

- Sha, M., **Chen, P.-C.**, Chen, Y., Foster, B., & Staresina, B. (2024, Dec). Coupled sleep rhythms in human hippocampus support memory consolidation. 4th International Sleep Replay Workshop (Virtual).

- Morehouse, A. B., Simon, K. C., Zhang, J., **Chen, P.-C.**, Whitehurst, L. N., & Mednick, S. C. (2023, April). Does cardiac autonomic variation across sleep stages differentially impact emotional and neutral memory consolidation? Learning & Memory 2023, Huntington Beach, CA, USA.

- Shuster, A., **Chen, P.-C.**, Niknazar, H., & Mednick, S. C. (2023, April). Identifying novel markers of memory in REM sleep. International Conference on Learning & Memory 2023, Huntington Beach, CA, USA.

- Subramoniam, A., **Chen, P.-C.**, Mednick, S., & Whitehurst, L. N. (2022, June). Slow oscillation power and heart rate variability during sleep predicts next-day subjective sleepiness in healthy young adults. 35th Annual Meeting of APSS, Charlotte, NC, USA.

- Arumugam, A., Mair, S., Zhang, J., & **Chen, P.-C.** (2022, May). Role of sex hormones and sleep on anxiety levels. 2022 UCLA Psychology Undergraduate Research Conference (PURC).

- Cho, S., Sam, K., Zhang, J., & **Chen, P.-C.** (2022, May). The interaction between dream recall, declarative memory, and sex hormones. 2022 UCLA Psychology Undergraduate Research Conference (PURC).

- Delvey, C. & **Chen, P.-C.** (2018, Nov). Central autonomic couplings during sleep can predict sleep-induced working memory improvement. 2018 Southern California Conferences for Undergraduate Research.

- Bayati, M. & **Chen, P.-C.** (2018, Nov). Age-related changes in central autonomic couplings during sleep. 2018 Southern California Conferences for Undergraduate Research.
